llm_summary: The updated Meta Generative AI Terms clarify that in the European region and the United Kingdom, the company relies on legitimate interests to collect and process personal information from publicly available and licensed sources specifically for AI development. The mention of information shared on Meta’s products and services has been removed from this context. No other substantive changes were made to the document.

modified_paragraphs.after: We are committed to being transparent about the legal bases that we use for processing information. We believe use of this information is in the legitimate interests of Meta, our users, and other people. In the European region and the United Kingdom, we rely on the basis of legitimate interests to collect and process any personal information included in the publicly available and licensed sources to develop and improve AI at Meta. For other jurisdictions where applicable, we rely on an adequate legal basis to collect and process this data. You have rights related to how your information is used for AI at Meta. Learn more and submit requests here.
modified_paragraphs.before: We are committed to being transparent about the legal bases that we use for processing information. We believe use of this information is in the legitimate interests of Meta, our users, and other people. In the European region and the United Kingdom, we rely on the basis of legitimate interests to collect and process any personal information included in the publicly available and licensed sources, as well as information people have shared on Meta’s Products and services, to develop and improve AI at Meta. For other jurisdictions where applicable, we rely on an adequate legal basis to collect and process this data. You have rights related to how your information is used for AI at Meta. Learn more and submit requests here.
